name: query-lsass-dumping
bodyMarkdown:
# LSASS Credential Dump Detection Query

**Category:** Detection Chokepoints | **Maturity:** Hunt | **FP Rate:** Medium
**Techniques:** T1003.001 | **Log Sources:** Sysmon EID 10

```kql
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(1h)
| where FileName =~ "lsass.exe"
| where ActionType == "OpenProcess"
| extend GrantedAccess = tostring(parse_json(AdditionalFields).GrantedAccess)
| extend CallTrace = tostring(parse_json(AdditionalFields).CallTrace)
| where GrantedAccess in ("0x1010", "0x1FFFFF", "0x1410", "0x0810", "0x0040")
| where CallTrace has_any ("dbgcore.dll", "dbghelp.dll", "UNKNOWN")
| where InitiatingProcessFileName !in ("csrss.exe", "services.exe", "svchost.exe", "wininit.exe", "MsMpEng.exe")
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessFolderPath, GrantedAccess, CallTrace
| sort by Timestamp desc
```
